name: geological-context-media
title: Geological Context Media
description: A dwc:GeologicalContext as content in an ac:Media entity.

fields.name: media_fk
fields.title: Media (Foreign Key)
fields.description: An identifier for an ac:Media resource.
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to preserve the relationship to the (Primary Key).
fields.rdfs:comment: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

fields.name: geologicalContext_fk
fields.title: Geological Context (Foreign Key)
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to preserve the relationship to the (Primary Key).
fields.rdfs:comment: An identifier for the set of information associated with a dwc:GeologicalContext (the location within a geological context, such as stratigraphy). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

fields.name: subjectCategory
fields.title: Subject Category
fields.description: A term to describe the content of a image or a region of interest within an image using a controlled value string.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: A term to describe the content of a image or a region of interest within an image using a controlled value string.

fields.name: subjectCategoryIRI
fields.title: Subject Category IRI
fields.description: An IRI of a controlled vocabulary value for the subject category of an ac:Media resource.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: A term to describe the content of the image by a value from a Controlled Vocabulary.

fields.name: subjectCategoryVocabulary
fields.title: Subject Category Source
fields.description: A reference to a controlled vocabulary in which the definition of a value in dwc:subjectCategory is given.
fields.comments: The Audiovisual Core recommended vocabularies do not need to be cited here. There is no required linkage between individual Subject Category terms and the vocabulary; the mechanism is intended to support discovery of the normative URI for a term, but not guarantee it.
fields.rdfs:comment: Any controlled vocabulary from which values for ac:CVtermLiteral have been drawn.

fields.name: subjectPartLiteral
fields.title: Subject Part Literal
fields.description: The portion or product of organism morphology, behaviour, environment, etc. that is either predominantly shown or particularly well exemplified by the ac:Media resource, denoted by a controlled value string.
fields.comments: Values SHOULD be selected from the Controlled Vocabulary for ac:subjectPart. It is best practice to use ac:subjectPart instead of ac:subjectPartLiteral whenever practical.
fields.rdfs:comment: The portion or product of organism morphology, behaviour, environment, etc. that is either predominantly shown or particularly well exemplified by the media resource, denoted by a controlled value string.

fields.name: subjectPart
fields.title: Subject Part
fields.description: The portion or product of organism morphology, behaviour, environment, etc. that is either predominantly shown or particularly well exemplified by the ac:Media resource, denoted by an IRI.
fields.rdfs:comment: The portion or product of organism morphology, behaviour, environment, etc. that is either predominantly shown or particularly well exemplified by the media resource, denoted by an IRI.

fields.name: subjectOrientationLiteral
fields.title: Subject Orientation Literal
fields.description: Specific orientation (= direction, view angle) of the subject represented in the ac:Media resource with respect to the acquisition device, denoted by a controlled value string.
fields.comments: Values SHOULD be selected from the Controlled Vocabulary for ac:subjectOrientation. It is best practice to use ac:subjectOrientation instead of ac:subjectOrientationLiteral whenever practical.
fields.rdfs:comment: Specific orientation (= direction, view angle) of the subject represented in the media resource with respect to the acquisition device, denoted by a controlled value string.

fields.name: subjectOrientation
fields.title: Subject Orientation
fields.description: Specific orientation (= direction, view angle) of the subject represented in the ac:Media resource with respect to the acquisition device.
fields.rdfs:comment: Specific orientation (= direction, view angle) of the subject represented in the media resource with respect to the acquisition device, denoted by an IRI.

fields.name: physicalSetting
fields.title: Physical Setting
fields.description: The setting of the content represented in an ac:Media resource, such as images, sounds, and movies if the provider deems them relevant.
fields.rdfs:comment: The setting of the content represented in media such as images, sounds, and movies if the provider deems them relevant.
